sanskrit: य इमं परमं गुह्यं मद्भक्तेष्वभिधास्यति । भक्ितं मयि परां कृत्वा मामेवैष्यत्यसंशयः ॥
hindiTranslation: मेरेमें पराभक्ति करके जो इस परम गोपनीय संवादगीताग्रन्थ को मेरे भक्तोंमें कहेगा, वह मुझे ही प्राप्त होगा  इसमें कोई सन्देह नहीं है ॥
englishTranslation: Whoever shares this supreme secret among my devotees, with devoted love for me, will surely come to me without doubt.
essence: Devotion deepens when sacred truth is passed on.
speaker: Krishna
simpleMeaning: Anyone who shares this deepest teaching with devoted love will reach Krishna without doubt.
simpleInsight: Teaching what you love deepens your own bond with it.
detailedMeaning: On Kurukshetra, after Krishna has offered the final surrender, he adds one more promise: the deepest teaching is not meant to stay locked inside Arjuna. Whoever speaks it to Krishna's devotees with devotion becomes one of those who reaches Krishna.
modernRelevance: You finally understand something life-changing after a long crisis, and your first instinct is to keep it private. The verse says the truth ripens when you pass it on with reverence.
translationLiteral: यः (whoever) / इमम् (this) / परमम् (supreme) / गुह्यम् (secret) / मद्भक्तेषु (among my devotees) / अभिधास्यति (will speak, will declare) / भक्तिम् (devotion) / मयि (in me) / पराम् (highest) / कृत्वा (having made) / माम् (me) / एव (indeed) / एष्यति (will come, will attain) / असंशयः (without doubt)
